title: The BEST DonutSMP Modpack
description: A lightweight, PvP-focused DonutSMP modpack built for maximum FPS, clean visuals, and smooth gameplay. Client-side only, optimized for performance, and designed to stay within server rules.
body:
# The BEST DonutSMP Modpack

**The BEST DonutSMP Modpack** is a lightweight, PvP-focused modpack built specifically for **DonutSMP players** who want maximum FPS, clean visuals, and smooth gameplay—without breaking server rules.

This pack removes unnecessary bloat and focuses on what actually matters on DonutSMP: **performance, visibility, responsiveness, and quality-of-life**.

## 🔥 Key Features
- **Extreme FPS optimization** for crystal PvP, grinding, and long sessions  
- **Clean PvP visuals** with clearer entities, particles, and effects  
- **Client-side QoL mods** that improve gameplay without illegal advantages  
- **Smoother movement and low-latency feel**  
- **DonutSMP-friendly** and designed to stay within server rules  
- **Lightweight & fast** load times with no unnecessary mods  

## 🎯 Who This Is For
- DonutSMP PvP players (crystal, anchor, cart, and regular PvP)  
- Players who prioritize **performance over cosmetics**  
- Anyone tired of laggy, bloated modpacks  

## ⚙️ Compatibility
- Optimized for **DonutSMP**  
- **Client-side only**  
- Easy install, no setup required  

If you want a **clean, fast, no-excuses DonutSMP experience**, this is the modpack for you.
